entries.title: <!DOCTYPE html PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Trans...
entries.content:
<!DOCTYPE html PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Transitional//EN" "https://www.w3.org/TR/xhtml1/DTD/xhtml1-transitional.dtd">
<html xmlns="https://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:v="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" xmlns:o="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office">
<head>
<title>AWS</title>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf_8" />
<meta content="width=device-width, minimal-ui, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=0;" name="viewport" />
<meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark" />
<meta name="supported-color-schemes" content="light dark" />
<meta content="telephone=no" name="format-detection" />
<!-- Background Image -->
<!-- Outlook Height -->
<!-- Top Space -->
<!-- Bottom Space -->
<style>
    @font-face {
        font-family: 'AmazonEmber-Light';

Learn how the cloud is accelerating innovation in businesses of all sizes
https://innovate-emea.virtual.awsevents.com/register?trk=e8ccedb9-1d02-4887-bfa3-6d9c8699a6b0&sc_channel=em
 
 

 

October 06, 2022 | 10:00 - 15:00 CEST | Online
 
Ready when you are. Last chance to sign up.
 
 
Register Now!
 
 

Join us at AWS Innovate - Every Application Edition to learn how you can work with AWS to improve your application security, performance, and scalability.

Register now to take your applications to the next level.
 
 

Don't want to receive emails related to Innovate Every Application Edition? Click here to opt out.
